heading: Repealed. ,Dec. 16, 1930, ch. 14, § 146 Stat. 1029
label: 181 Repealed. ,Dec. 16, 1930, ch. 14, § 146 Stat. 1029
notes: Section, , , provided that a person making an entry which was lost or forfeited should be entitled to benefits of homestead laws as though the former entry had not been made. See .act June 5, 1900, ch. 716, § 331 Stat. 270section 182 of this title
